title: isodon shikokianus var. occidentalis
intro: Isodon shikokianus var. occidentalis, also known as a variety of the Isodon plant, is a type of flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family, native to Japan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Isodon shikokianus var. occidentalis include reducing fever, relieving colds and flu, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
